name: Softlab S.p.A.
summary: Softlab S.p.A., operates in the ICT sector in Italy, Latin America, other European countries, India, North America, and internationally. The company operates through three segments: Acotel Interactive, Bucksense, and Acotel Net. The Acotel Interactive segment offers digital entertainment products and services, including mobile entertainment, casual gaming, social dating, and games of skill offerings marketed under consumer brands, such as SkillDerby for smartphone games, SkillSweet for Web games, Yabox for casual gaming on PC, and Flycell for the download of content, as well as SurveyLotto, GiocaNews, and Palpitamos for prize competitions. The Bucksense segment offers programmatic advertising services. The Acotel Net segment is involved in the design, production, and maintenance of electronic security systems in Italy, as well as engages in the installation, supply, servicing, and maintenance of remote surveillance equipment. This segment also offers energy and health management services. Softlab S.p.A. was incorporated in 2003 and is based in Rome, Italy.
